text: brain, heart, liver, lungs, kidneys, stomach, intestines, bladder, pancreas. The biggest lie about learning English, that you need more vocabulary. You don't. You need to start speaking. Stacy, what advice would you give to a beginner who wants to improve their English quickly? Just talk to me every day. Daily practice with AI tutors works wonders. That's why fluently works. It's like a speaking partner in your pocket. Stop learning English. Start speaking with fluently app.
